mapper.sql: reservation_id, manager_id, user_id, device_id, start_time, end_time, status, created_at, return_at
mapper.insert: insert into reservation (reservation_id, manager_id, user_id, device_id, start_time, end_time, status, created_at, return_at, purpose) values (#{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{purpose,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into reservation
reservation_id,
manager_id,
user_id,
device_id,
start_time,
end_time,
status,
created_at,
return_at,
purpose,
#{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{purpose,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update reservation
manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
start_time = #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
end_time = #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
return_at = #{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
purpose = #{purpose,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where reservation_id = #{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update reservation set manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_time = #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, return_at = #{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, purpose = #{purpose,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where reservation_id = #{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update reservation set manager_id = #{manager_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, device_id = #{device_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, start_time = #{start_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, end_time = #{end_time,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_at = #{created_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, return_at = #{return_at,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where reservation_id = #{reservation_id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select
,
from reservation where user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status = '未完成'

select
,
from reservation where user_id = #{user_id,jdbcType=INTEGER} and status != '未完成'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND status IN ('未完成', '处理中') AND ( (start_time < #{endTime} AND end_time > #{startTime}) )
